message:
Fix Lance v2 format parsing for string and int64 columns

- Fix ColumnMetadata parsing to skip field 1 (encoding) before reading
  field 2 (pages) in both getPageBufferInfo and getStringBufferInfo
- Fix string offset format: Lance v2 uses N offsets (end positions) for
  N strings, not N+1 offsets like Arrow
- Fix getStringCount to only return count for actual string columns
  (columns with 2 buffers: offsets + data)
- Add showColumnChips() call when loading local files

Based on official Lance v2 spec from protos/file2.proto and
protos/encodings_v2_0.proto
